title: Model Library tile: 101% overshoot + missing Verifying stage
description: New Model Library UI (MpiModelManager lean tile, MPI-215 rewrite) has 2 progress-render bugs: (1) install progress can show 101% because job.progress is not clamped; (2) the indeterminate 'Verifying…' stage is emitted by the download manager but never rendered by the lean tile. Both fixed 2026-07-07 (found while installing Chroma/MPI-217). Logic-verified, needs live re-confirm.
